case_title: TAMI L MOODY VS. CITA AMERICAS, INC., AN UNREGISTERED CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOODY, TAMI L AS TO DEFENDANT CITA AMERICAS, INC., AN UNREGISTERED CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOODY, TAMI L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITA AMERICAS, INC., AN UNREGISTERED CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $12,466.41 PRINCIPAL, $727.59 INTEREST, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,314.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
